notes: FROZEN (agent=yes, daemon=incapable). kiro-cli 2.5.1 DOES swap the active model mid-session via the in-REPL /model picker, but the daemon cannot observe it: the tailed <uuid>.jsonl carries no model/token/cost (event vocab Prompt/AssistantMessage/ToolResults/Clear, FINDINGS.md §4) and kirocli/parser.go sets ModelName on no path, so the scenario's core model A->B assertion (and TotalTokens accumulation) is unrecoverable from the watched Source -> route frozen. No state phases are asserted: with no model signal in the transcript there is nothing for the verify engine to check against the recording. The observation vector is documented for completeness — model is unknown (no model field in the JSONL), cost/tokens are zero (no token/cost field; sidecar token counts are 0). Were this cell ever unblocked, it would need a sidecar MetricsReader over <uuid>.json (rts_model_state.model_info.model_id), and even then per-turn A->B attribution may remain impossible because rts_model_state tracks only the current model. driver=gap:keys (the /model picker needs an arrow-key `keys` step the kiro-cli driver stubs) is moot here — porting it would not make the cell recordable.
